title: Tender and Grassy Croatian Suet Dumplings
description: A traditional Croatian dish featuring suet and dumplings served as a kid-friendly dinner option.

ingredients.name: Lamb Suet
ingredients.notes: You can also use beef or mutton suet if you can't find lamb.

ingredients.name: Chopped Fresh Parsley
ingredients.notes: Gives the dumplings a nice grassy flavor.

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine suet, flour, eggs, melted butter, salt, and black pepper. Mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Shape each piece into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk.
In a large pot, bring the beef stock to a boil.
Gently place the dumplings into the boiling stock and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the dumplings with a slotted spoon and serve hot with a dollop of sour cream and some chopped fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
